name: Zesty Artichoke Basil Sauce
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz Whole Peeled Tomatoes - Undrained, 1 Can, 1 3/4 Cup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2 1/2-quart saucepan, heat the reserved marinade.
2. Cook and stir the onion and garlic in the marinade for 2 to 3 minutes or until tender.
3. Chop the artichoke hearts and add to the onion mixture with the tomatoes and juice, tomato paste, water, basil, and salt.
4. Break up the tomatoes. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, and simmer, uncovered, for 15 to 20 minutes.
Savory Capers and Olives Sauce:
1. Eliminate the marinated artichoke hearts and basil.
2. In a 2 1/2-quart saucepan, heat 2 tbsp Olive Oil.
3. Cook and stir the onion and garlic for 2 to 3 minutes or until tender.
4. Add 3/4 cup sliced and quartered zucchini, tomatoes, juice, tomato paste, water, salt, 1/2 cup (2 1/4 oz) of drained olives, and 2 tbsp drained capers.
5. Proceed as directed above.
